meta.title: Wasan kalma na yau da kullum
meta.description: Ka gano kalmar da aka boye cikin kokari 6 (ko kasa). Sabuwar wasa kowace rana!
meta.keywords: Hausa, wasa, kalma, buga, online, gano, yau da kullum

text.no_attempts: Ba ka gwada wata kalma ba tukuna!
text.share_challenge_win: Na warware Wordle na yau cikin {n}. Za ka iya fin fi ni?
text.share_challenge_lose: Ban iya warware Wordle na yau ba. Za ka iya?
text.hard_mode_position: Yanayin wuya: {letter} dole ne ya kasance a matsayi {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Yanayin wuya: dole kalmar ta kunshi {letter}

help.title: Yadda Ake Wasa
help.text_1_2: Kowace kalmar da ka zaba dole ta kasance kalma mai haruffa biyar. Danna maballin enter don aika.
help.text_1_3: Bayan ka zaba, tiles za su canza launi don nuna wadanne haruffa ne daidai ko kusan daidai.
help.text_2_1: yana cikin kalmar kuma yana wurin da ya dace!
help.text_2_2: yana cikin kalmar, amma ba wurin da ya dace ba.
help.text_2_3: ba ya cikin kalmar da kake kokarin gano.

ui.word_info_desc: Ma'ana da fasahar AI bayan wasa
ui.install_app_desc: Yi wasa ba tare da yanar gizo ba kuma sami gunkin app
ui.no_games_yet: Ba ka buga wasa ba tukuna. Zabi harshe don farawa!
ui.play_more_languages: Buga harsuna da yawa don ganin kididdiga na duniya!
ui.coming_soon: yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba!
ui.future_word: Ba a buga wannan kalmar ba tukuna. Dawo daga baya!
ui.daily_words_counting: kalmomi na kullum kuma suna karuwa
ui.difficulty_locked: Ba za a iya canza matsayi ba bayan hasashe
ui.easy_desc: An yarda da kowace kalma, ko da ba ta cikin kamus ba
ui.normal_desc: Hasashe dole ne ya kasance kalma mai inganci daga kamus
ui.hard_desc: Dole ne a yi amfani da alamomin da aka gano a hasashen da ke zuwa
ui.high_contrast_desc: Launuka masu dacewa da makafi launi
